name: Goppert Recreation Center
description: Goppert Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ottawa, KS. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Taylor's court
description: Come play pickleball at Taylor's court in Ottawa, KS! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.
